name: aerospace-chatbot

metadata.name: aerospace-chatbot
metadata.summary: Aerospace engineering chatbot and AI tools.

documentation:
# Aerospace Chatbot
Aerospace discipline-specific chatbots and AI tools.
Help docs here: https://aerospace-chatbot.readthedocs.io/en/latest/

## Deployments
See https://aerospace-chatbot.readthedocs.io/en/latest/help/deployments.html for details.

documentation: Return the current version of the package.

Load LLM model dependencies.

Returns:
    tuple: ChatOpenAI, ChatAnthropic

documentation:
Load LLM chain utilities.

Returns:
    tuple: itemgetter, StrOutputParser, RunnableLambda, RunnablePassthrough, ConversationBufferMemory, get_buffer_string, Document, format_document

methods.name: aerospace_chatbot.core.cache.Dependencies.Embeddings.get_models
documentation:
Load embedding model dependencies.

Returns:
    tuple: OpenAIEmbeddings, VoyageAIEmbeddings, HuggingFaceInferenceAPIEmbeddings

documentation:
Load vector store dependencies.

Returns:

methods.name: aerospace_chatbot.core.cache.Dependencies.Storage.get_db_clients
documentation:
Load database client dependencies.

Returns:
    tuple: pinecone_client, chromadb, ServerlessSpec, PersistentClient, RAGPretrainedModel

methods.name: aerospace_chatbot.core.cache.Dependencies.Analysis.get_tools
documentation:
Load analysis and data processing dependencies.

Returns:
    tuple: pandas, numpy, KMeans, Dataset

methods.name: aerospace_chatbot.core.cache.Dependencies.Document.get_processors
documentation:
Load document processing dependencies.

Returns:
    tuple: fitz, requests, storage, PyPDFLoader

methods.name: aerospace_chatbot.core.cache.Dependencies.Document.get_splitters
documentation:
Load document splitting dependencies.

Returns:
    RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter
Centralized dependency management with lazy loading.

documentation:
Get available indexes based on current settings. If embedding_model or rag_type are None, 
returns all indexes without filtering on those criteria.

documentation: Get status of database indexes/collections.

documentation: Get status of RAGatouille indexes.

classes.name: aerospace_chatbot.services.database.DatabaseService

methods.name: aerospace_chatbot.services.database.DatabaseService.__init__
documentation:
Initialize DatabaseService.

Args:
    db_type (str): Type of database ('Pinecone', 'ChromaDB', 'RAGatouille')
    index_name (str): Name of the index
    rag_type (str): Type of RAG ('Standard', 'Parent-Child', 'Summary')
    embedding_service (EmbeddingService): Embedding service instance
    doc_type (str, optional): Type of document ('document', 'question'). Defaults to 'document'.

methods.name: aerospace_chatbot.services.database.DatabaseService.initialize_database
documentation: Initialize and store database connection.

methods.name: aerospace_chatbot.services.database.DatabaseService.index_data
documentation:
Index processed documents or questions. 
If data is ChunkingResult type, chunked documents are processed.
If data is a list of Documents, questions are processed. Questions are not chunked or processed, just validated and upserted.
Database must be initialized before calling this method.

methods.name: aerospace_chatbot.services.database.DatabaseService.get_retriever
documentation: Get configured retriever for the vectorstore.

methods.name: aerospace_chatbot.services.database.DatabaseService.copy_vectors
documentation: Copies vectors from a source Pinecone namespace into the namespace assigned to the DatabaseService instance.

methods.name: aerospace_chatbot.services.database.DatabaseService.delete_index
documentation: Delete an index from the database.

methods.name: aerospace_chatbot.services.database.DatabaseService._init_chromadb
documentation: Initialize ChromaDB.

methods.name: aerospace_chatbot.services.database.DatabaseService._init_pinecone
documentation: Initialize Pinecone.

methods.name: aerospace_chatbot.services.database.DatabaseService._init_ragatouille
documentation: Initialize RAGatouille.

methods.name: aerospace_chatbot.services.database.DatabaseService._get_standard_retriever
documentation: Get standard retriever based on index type.

methods.name: aerospace_chatbot.services.database.DatabaseService._get_multivector_retriever
documentation: Get multi-vector retriever for Parent-Child or Summary RAG types.

methods.name: aerospace_chatbot.services.database.DatabaseService._process_retriever_args
documentation: Process the retriever arguments.

methods.name: aerospace_chatbot.services.database.DatabaseService._store_index_metadata
documentation: Store index metadata based on the database type.

methods.name: aerospace_chatbot.services.database.DatabaseService._validate_index
documentation:
Validate and format index with parameters.
Does nothing if no exceptions are raised, unless:
  RAG type is Parent-Child or Summary, which will append to index_name.
  doc_type is question, which will append 'queries' to index_name.

methods.name: aerospace_chatbot.services.database.DatabaseService._upsert_data
documentation: Upsert documents or questions. Used for all RAG types.

methods.name: aerospace_chatbot.services.database.DatabaseService._verify_pinecone_upload
documentation: Verify that vectors were uploaded to Pinecone index.
Handles database operations for different vector stores.
